description: Plugin-distributed hooks for finance. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location, not the consumer's project root.

hooks.comment: Flag finance anti-patterns: hardcoded rates in models, plaintext PII (SSN/IBAN/credit-card), variance commentary missing Sources, forecast/budget missing Assumptions. Advisory by default; flip exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce.
